body.title: agent_datacenter: SWADL shim stub — spec at implementation time
body.result: SwadlShim stub implemented in agent_datacenter/devices/swadl/shim.py. self_test returns passed=False with explanation. Commit 3850610.
body.description:
SWADL shim stub. Implements BaseShim with stubs; real lifecycle TBD when SWADL API stabilizes.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/devices/swadl/shim.py:
  class SWADLShim(BaseShim):
    device_id = 'swadl'
    start() → return False  # stub; not implemented
    stop() → return True
    restart() → return False
    self_test() → return {passed: False, details: 'SWADL shim not yet implemented'}
    rollback() → pass

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/swadl/shim.py

Design rules:
- oop-first: SWADLShim class, not module-level stubs

Scope boundary:
IN: stub shim that compiles and passes BaseShim contract check
OUT: any SWADL integration

Test plan:
- SWADLShim() instantiates (all abstract methods present)
- self_test() returns {passed: False, ...} without raising
